title: Remote work memo
task: Write an internal memo announcing a new remote work policy for a 120-person software company. Explain the policy, the reason for it, and what employees need to do next.

title: Budget freeze memo
task: Write an internal memo explaining a temporary budget freeze to department heads at a regional hospital. State what is affected, what is not, and what questions managers should bring forward.

title: Heat pump explainer
task: Write a short explainer for homeowners about how heat pumps work and why someone might choose one over a gas furnace.

title: Municipal bonds explainer
task: Write a plain-English explainer for a general audience about what municipal bonds are and why cities issue them.

title: Custodian profile
task: Write a profile of a public high school custodian who has worked in the building for 28 years and knows every student by name.

title: Ferry captain profile
task: Write a profile of a ferry captain who has spent three decades running the same route between two small coastal towns.

title: Neighborhood meeting guide
task: Write a practical guide explaining how a resident can organize a neighborhood meeting about traffic safety on a busy street.

title: Water leak guide
task: Write a practical guide for apartment tenants on what to do when they discover a water leak in the ceiling.

title: Library hours op-ed
task: Write an opinion piece arguing that a city library system should stay open later in the evening.

title: Bus lanes op-ed
task: Write an opinion piece arguing for dedicated bus lanes on a congested urban corridor.

title: First union job essay
task: Write a personal nonfiction essay about the first day at a union job that changed the writer's idea of what work could be.

title: Public pool essay
task: Write a personal nonfiction essay about a neighborhood public pool and what it revealed about a town.

title: Incident response memo
task: Write an internal memo after a company-wide outage. Explain what happened, what the team has fixed, and what employees should expect next.

title: Food recall explainer
task: Write a consumer explainer about what a food recall means and what people should do if a product in their kitchen is recalled.

title: Public defender profile
task: Write a profile of a public defender handling a heavy caseload in a midsize city.

title: School board comment guide
task: Write a practical guide explaining how a parent can prepare to speak at a school board meeting.

title: Corner store zoning op-ed
task: Write an opinion piece arguing that a neighborhood should allow small corner stores in residential areas.

title: Night shift bus essay
task: Write a personal nonfiction essay about riding the same late-night bus home for a year.

title: Property tax explainer
task: Write a plain-English explainer for homeowners about how property taxes are set and why they can change from year to year.

title: Schedule change memo
task: Write an internal memo to warehouse employees announcing a shift schedule change ahead of the holiday season.
